description: A supplier has released their new catalog for the year. A procurement manager needs to get the new catalog and update the system.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to request their new product catalog and price list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an email to the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new catalog file from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: The supplier sends the new catalog as a spreadsheet.

nodes.task_description: Upload the new catalog to the system, updating existing products and adding new ones.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the company's product database with the new supplier information.
